text:
Created attachment 187879
svn diff for biology/hmmer

Update biology/hmmer to 3.1b2 with changes of MASTER_SITES & WWW (remove BROKEN)

other changes
*Make verbose output during build (V=1)
*Update DOCFILES & EXAMPLES
*Tune up post-install process
*New OPTION: TEST

The port passed make test & poudriere testport in my environment (10.4 amd64/i386).
